config.name: SimpleSweep
config.description: Step 12.0 baseline — mirror variant. Every available bot pilots the SAME deck (bulwark-control) so any win-rate spread is attributable to pilot skill, not deck choice. bulwark-control is chosen because it's the closer-less deck surfaced by 12.0's first run; if any bot can make it win, that's a meaningful result. Includes self-mirrors so we see per-bot seed variance. Pairs with the canonical PairCorrectly run to separate deck signal from bot signal in 12.0's baseline artifacts.

notes: Close race: 'Fort' edges out runner-up by 6 points — consider more games per matchup.
21 matchup(s) drew ≥ 40% of games — worth inspecting for stall states.

learningLog: Tournament 'SimpleSweep' ran 840 games across 21 matchup(s). Pairs: Fort=(deck:bulwark-control,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-fortress), Hell=(deck:bulwark-control,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-hellfire), Reap=(deck:bulwark-control,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-reaper), Wave=(deck:bulwark-control,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-wavebreaker), Util=(deck:bulwark-control,bot:utility), Fixed=(deck:bulwark-control,bot:fixed)

Matchup Fort vs Fort: deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' versus deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress'. Fort won 4/40 (AWins:2,Draws:34, A side 5%). Self-mirror — indicates raw seed-driven variance and whether the pairing is stable given the RNG. Average game length: 367 steps.

Matchup Fort vs Hell: deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' versus deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-hellfire'. Fort won 3/40 (BWins:1,Draws:36, 8%). Same deck, different bots: 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' pilots 'bulwark-control' better than 'experimental/2026-04-19-hellfire' in decisive games (4 of 40). Treat as evidence of pilot skill on this deck. Average game length: 386 steps.

Matchup Fort vs Reap: deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' versus deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-reaper'. Fort won 5/40 (BWins:0,Draws:35, 12%). Same deck, different bots: 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' pilots 'bulwark-control' better than 'experimental/2026-04-19-reaper' in decisive games (5 of 40). Treat as evidence of pilot skill on this deck. Average game length: 376 steps.

Same deck, different bots: 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' pilots 'bulwark-control' better than 'utility' in decisive games (5 of 40). Treat as evidence of pilot skill on this deck. Matchup Fort vs Fixed: deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' versus deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'fixed'. Fort won 1/40 (BWins:0,Draws:39, 2%). Same deck, different bots: 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' pilots 'bulwark-control' better than 'fixed' in decisive games (1 of 40). Treat as evidence of pilot skill on this deck. Matchup Hell vs Hell: deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-hellfire' versus deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-hellfire'. Tied 0-0-40 over 40 games. Self-mirror that stalled out on every game — no signal at all; the matchup's RNG + bot combination never closes out. Consider raising maxInputsPerGame or inspecting the encoding for stall loops. Average game length: 422 steps.

Across all matchups, 'Fort' (deck:bulwark-control,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-fortress) outperformed 'Hell' (deck:bulwark-control,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-hellfire). Pattern: the top pair's bot profile is worth studying as a candidate to pair with similar decks; the weakest pair suggests either a weight-table mismatch or a deck that disagrees with the bot's scoring priorities.
Observation: Close race: 'Fort' edges out runner-up by 6 points — consider more games per matchup.
Observation: 21 matchup(s) drew ≥ 40% of games — worth inspecting for stall states.

LEARNING HINT: When choosing a bot for a new deck, prefer profiles whose matched decks in this tournament share archetype tags (aggro/control/midrange) with the new deck. Avoid pairing a utility bot tuned for defence with an aggro deck — it will underweight tempo plays.
